title: Efficient Cross-View Localization in 6G Space-Air-Ground Integrated Network

text:
Moreover, we have analyzed the impact of feature
extraction model partition points on the user experience of
CVL within the proposed framework, and have introduced
a reinforcement learning-based joint optimization method for
communication, computation, and confidentiality. In the case
study, we have verified the proposed split-inference framework
and joint optimization method. The experimental results have
shown that the framework improves localization accuracy,
while the performance of CVL in latency, energy consumption,
and privacy protection is jointly optimized in a balanced
manner.
title: Efficient Cross-View Localization in 6G Space-Air-Ground Integrated Network
